title: Secret Smoke Session
card_text: Advance to Start Session. Collect 200 Bud Bucks.
mechanical_effect: Move player to space 1 and collect 200
art_direction: smoke trail pointing to start arrow

title: Compliance Sweep
card_text: Go directly to Trim Jail. Do not collect 200 Bud Bucks.
mechanical_effect: Move player to space 11; no Start payout

title: Back Alley Shortcut
card_text: Move forward 3 spaces.
mechanical_effect: Advance player 3 spaces

title: Couch Locked
card_text: Take a Smoke Break. Skip your next turn.
mechanical_effect: Player loses next turn

title: Strain Hype
card_text: Your strain review goes viral. Collect 100 Bud Bucks.
mechanical_effect: Collect 100

title: Overpriced Snacks
card_text: You bought snacks for the table. Pay 50 Bud Bucks.
mechanical_effect: Pay bank 50

title: Advance to Indica
card_text: Advance to Indica. If owned by another player pay rent.
mechanical_effect: Move to space 6; pay rent if owned

title: Advance to Hybrid
card_text: Advance to Hybrid. If owned by another player pay rent.
mechanical_effect: Move to space 26; pay rent if owned

title: Nearest Category
card_text: Advance to the nearest category space. Pay double rent if owned.
mechanical_effect: Move to nearest Indica/Sativa/Hybrid/Autoflower; double rent if owned

title: Nearest Utility
card_text: Advance to the nearest utility. Roll dice and pay owner 10x the roll if owned.
mechanical_effect: Move to nearest Grow Lights/Water Works; utility rent rule

title: Dispensary Detour
card_text: Advance to the nearest unowned property. You may buy it.
mechanical_effect: Move to next unowned property; may purchase

title: Stash Audit
card_text: Pay 25 Bud Bucks per Grow Tent and 100 Bud Bucks per Dispensary you own.
mechanical_effect: Pay property improvement assessment

title: Seeds Came In
card_text: Collect 50 Bud Bucks.
mechanical_effect: Collect 50

title: Bad Batch Refund
card_text: Collect 75 Bud Bucks from the bank.
mechanical_effect: Collect 75

title: Rolling Papers Run
card_text: Move back 2 spaces.
mechanical_effect: Move player back 2 spaces

title: VIP Lounge
card_text: Collect 25 Bud Bucks from each player.
mechanical_effect: Each other player pays current player 25

title: Missed The Session
card_text: Pay each player 25 Bud Bucks.
mechanical_effect: Current player pays every other player 25

title: Get Out Of Trim Jail
card_text: Keep this card until needed or sell/trade it.
mechanical_effect: Player may leave Trim Jail once without paying

title: Market Spike
card_text: Collect rent from one property you own even if no player is on it.
mechanical_effect: Choose one owned property; collect base rent from bank

title: Grow Tent Sale
card_text: Build one Grow Tent for 50 Bud Bucks less than normal this turn.
mechanical_effect: Discount applies to one Grow Tent purchase

title: Too Much Heat
card_text: Pay 100 Bud Bucks for ventilation repairs.
mechanical_effect: Pay bank 100

title: Advance to OG Kush
card_text: Advance to OG Kush. If owned by another player pay rent.
mechanical_effect: Move to space 38; pay rent if owned

title: Advance to Blue Dream
card_text: Advance to Blue Dream. If owned by another player pay rent.
mechanical_effect: Move to space 20; pay rent if owned

title: High Roller
card_text: Roll one die and collect 20 Bud Bucks times the result.
mechanical_effect: Roll 1 die; collect result x 20
